rationale: OSS change (all paths under web/src/). The diff adds a ShareButton to the Metrics page (Index.vue), bidirectional URL state synchronization (panel ↔ URL via metrics_data blob), deep-link override handling for inbound links from alerts/logs/incidents, and a share-URL computation. This is a user-facing UI flow — users can now share metrics views via generated deep links, and inbound deep links restore the full panel configuration. No REST endpoints are added or altered (needs_api=false). The change lives in the Metrics area and should join the existing Metrics Playwright shard. No existing Playwright tests were touched; the .spec.ts files in the diff are unit tests only.
